meaning: n.莱尔线(一种光滑坚韧的棉线,用以织袜子、手套等),莱尔线织物adj.莱尔线的
examples: All Lisle hotels are located within three miles of the Benedictine University.
An officer called Rouget DE Lisle wrote a song for the republican army the Marseillaise, which has become the national song of France.
In the early 1900s, William Pennington and Lisle Updike spent most days traveling the four corners area of Colorado, Utah, New Mexico and Arizona in a wagon photographing the people and landscapes.
Clarke, a former General Motors executive, joined the Lisle, Illinois-based company in 2010.
Brian S. Wesbury is chief economist, and Robert Stein senior economist, at First Trust Advisors in Lisle, Ill.
